name: list_submissions
description: List all submissions for a specific Netlify form. Returns the submitted field values, timestamps, submitter IP (if available), and user agent. Supports pagination for forms with many submissions.

parameters.name: form_id
parameters.description: The form ID to list submissions for.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for pagination. Default is 1.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Number of submissions per page. Default is 100.

data.name: Alice Johnson
data.message: Love your blog! Could you write about serverless architectures?

data.name: Bob Smith
data.message: Found a typo on the pricing page. The annual plan says $99/year but the checkout shows $119.
